title: A Helping Hand
lesson: Helping a friend who needs you makes you both happy.
prompts: On a sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image skips happily on the soft grass near the sandbox and the swings, with a happy smile. Medium shot at eye level, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a sunny playground in the green park — a sandbox and a set of swings, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, one hand raised to their cheek in surprise, with a caring expression. gists: At a sunny park playground with a sandbox and swings, the child skips happily on the grass alone.
At the playground, the child raises a hand to their cheek in concern as a young boy has tripped and sits by a tipped basket with toy blocks spilled, looking sad.
At the playground, the child hurries over reaching out with a kind, determined look while the boy sits by the spilled blocks, looking up hopefully — the child comes to help.
At the playground, the child kneels gathering the spilled blocks back into the basket, smiling, while the boy watches gratefully.
At the playground, the child holds out a helping hand while the boy stands back up holding the refilled basket, smiling gratefully — helping him up.
At the playground in golden light, the child and the boy kneel playing with the blocks together, both happy — helping a friend made both glad.
texts: It was a bright morning at the park. {NAME} skipped happily past the swings and the sandbox. "What a lovely day!" sang {NAME}.
Then {NAME} saw a friend trip and fall. His basket tipped and toys spilled everywhere. "Oh no, are you okay?" asked {NAME}. The friend looked so sad.
"I'll help you!" called {NAME}, hurrying over. "Really?" said the friend, looking up full of hope. "Of course!" said {NAME}.
{NAME} knelt down and gathered every toy back into the basket. "There we go," said {NAME}. The friend smiled to see such kind help.
{NAME} reached out a hand and helped the friend stand up. "Thank you so much!" he said, holding his basket again. "You're welcome!" said {NAME}.
Then they played together in the sunshine, laughing and glad. "Helping is fun!" said {NAME}. Helping a friend made them both happy.
